TRIAL BY COURT CONCLUDED. IN ONE-HALF DAY; WITNESSES AFFIRMED AND EXAMINED, DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED AND MARKED; BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND DEFENSE REST, NO REBUTTAL. THE COURT RULES JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF; DEFENDANTS TO MOVE OUT OF THE PREMISE AT 187 FLOURNOY STREET, S.F., CA 94114 BY OCTOBER-19-2011; DEFENDANTS TO CONTINUE TO PAY $40.00 PER DAY OR $1200.00 PER MONTH; IF NO PAYMENTS MADE, COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF MAY RETURN TO THE COURT TO LIFT THE STAY AND CONVERT TO IMMEDIATE EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF COUNSE TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT THE JUDGMENT FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. JUDGE: HON. LINDA H. COLFAX; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; REPORTER: ARLENE HOWELL, C.S.R. #2542 (D-525).
